label: Transparent Caracal motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Caracal transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated caracal profile motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A caracal wild cat in elegant side profile with accurate anatomy, cinnamon-sand fur, darker warm tawny shadows, black ear tufts, black ear backs, fine whiskers, amber eye, lean agile neck and shoulder silhouette, subtle savanna-dust texture in the coat, crisp complete cutout.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show head, ears with long black tufts, neck, upper shoulder, and clean profile without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves cinnamon fur, black ear markings, amber eye detail, and fine fur texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second animal, no lynx, no leopard spots, no domestic cat collar, no floor shadow, no contact shadow.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board derived from the provided caracal profile motif cutout for "Morphous Caracal".
Reference use: Use the visible caracal motif as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from cinnamon fur, black ear tufts, sand habitat, amber eye, cream muzzle, and agile profile lines.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, target 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Caracal", motif story "agile planning system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, sample usage.
Typography: include English guidance and Japanese guidance with readable examples such as "Agile planning" and "俊敏な計画"; choose font guidance for multilingual product UI.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, quiet planning and operations UI, precise grid, 8px radius cards, lean vertical navigation, compact kanban/planning dashboard, amber focus rings, black ear-tuft dividers, sand paper surfaces.
Color palette: motif-derived only: cinnamon fur #b96f32, sand background #ead5ad, black ear #17130f, deep umber #4b2b1a, cream muzzle #f6ead3, amber eye #c7923a, dust sage #8a8f68, warm clay #d58a4d, shadow taupe #7b6652.
Components: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette/search, progress, toast, empty/error/loading states.
Dashboard/data: planning timeline, sprint velocity bars, burndown line, task status donut, priority chips, compact metrics.
Texture/tokens: subtle short-fur grain, sand stipple, ear-tuft accent strokes, spacing/radius/shadow token samples.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no leopard spots, no domestic cat theme, no second animal.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Morphous Caracal" design-system board. It must feel like the same agile planning system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible caracal motif and light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, lean component language, short-fur texture, sand spacing rhythm, black ear-tuft dividers, amber focus rings, and compact planning dashboard patterns.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, target 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Caracal", "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, sample usage.
Visual details: dark background derived from ear black and deep umber, warm cream text from muzzle highlights, cinnamon primary actions, amber focus rings, dust sage secondary support, shadow taupe borders, subtle savanna sand grain and short-fur texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English guidance and Japanese guidance with readable examples such as "Agile planning" and "俊敏な計画"; choose font guidance for multilingual product UI.
Components: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette/search, progress, toast, empty/error/loading states.
Dashboard/data: planning timeline, sprint velocity bars, burndown line, task status donut, priority chips, compact metrics.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no pure flat black, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no leopard spots, no domestic cat theme, no second animal.
